---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of what you want.

## Problem it solves

What problem or limitation does this address? Who would benefit?

## Proposed solution

Describe how you think it should work. Be as specific as you can.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about, and why you prefer this one.

## Additional context

Mockups, examples from other tools, relevant links, etc.
